access_route: Wayback capture of SSRN abstract_id=5735022 linked directly from the Retraction Watch fake-article-network report
observed_public_text_or_fact: Archived SSRN page displays: "This paper is under review or has been removed from SSRN at the request of the author, SSRN, or the rights holder."
interpretation_scope: Supports a narrow claim that at least one fake-article-network row now has a direct platform removal/under-review record rather than only specialist reporting.
publication_posture_delta: One residual research-integrity lead can leave the fully weak-source-only bucket and become a case-grade platform-action exemplar, while the package's top-depth blockers stay unchanged.
remaining_limitations: The archived SSRN page does not itself identify plagiarism, actor identity, wider network scope, or who requested removal.
paper_thesis_use: Useful for methods/results prose on residual-bucket hardening and for thesis discussion of how network-level research-integrity leads can cross from discovery-only reporting into direct action-record states.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Residual-category panel; source-depth ladder sidecar; platform-action upgrade badge
caution: Do not restate the archive notice as a finding of confirmed plagiarism or proof that the entire fake-article network has been resolved.

observed_public_text_or_fact: Retraction Watch reports: "As of last week, 11 of the 15 fake articles had been removed from SSRN's website for 'confirmed plagiarism,' according to an Elsevier spokesperson. Since our questions to the publisher, the remaining four under investigation have also been removed."
interpretation_scope: Supports contextual corroboration that the network included platform removals and that SSRN/Elsevier described the removals as plagiarism-related, but this remains secondary to the archived platform page for row-level use.
publication_posture_delta: Raises confidence that the archived SSRN removal page is part of the same fake-article-network action sequence, without turning the row into a full publisher-notice or institution-investigation exemplar.
remaining_limitations: This sentence is reported by a specialist outlet and should not be substituted for a platform page when the claim is about exact row-level action text.
paper_thesis_use: Provides reviewer-safe triangulation between a direct platform surface and the discovery report, strengthening a methods note on why one residual row is no longer discovery-only.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Residual-escape provenance card; platform-action corroboration sidecar
caution: Do not collapse the specialist report into direct-platform text or generalize the SSRN action to other platforms named in the article.

access_route: Local synthesis over the two public records above
observed_public_text_or_fact: After this cycle, the residual package splits into: one archived SSRN platform-action exemplar for the fake-article-network row, plus two remaining weak rows still supported only by specialist reporting or unresolved discovery surfaces.
interpretation_scope: Supports a bounded package-level statement that the residual floor is no longer uniform.
publication_posture_delta: Improves methods credibility and reviewer legibility without changing the package's top-depth route order.
remaining_limitations: The historical fake-peer-review row and the Finland procedural row do not become direct-action cases through this artifact.
